workspaces.workspace.CfnAbout:
The `AWS::WorkSpaces::Workspace` resource specifies a WorkSpace.

Updates are not supported for the `BundleId`, `RootVolumeEncryptionEnabled`, `UserVolumeEncryptionEnabled`, or `VolumeEncryptionKey` properties. To update these properties, you must also update a property that triggers a replacement, such as the `UserName` property.

workspaces.workspace.BundleId.Description: The identifier of the bundle for the WorkSpace.

workspaces.workspace.DirectoryId.Description: The identifier of the AWS Directory Service directory for the WorkSpace.

workspaces.workspace.RootVolumeEncryptio.Description: Indicates whether the data stored on the root volume is encrypted.

workspaces.workspace.UserName.Description: The user name of the user for the WorkSpace. This user name must exist in the AWS Directory Service directory for the WorkSpace.

workspaces.workspace.UserVolumeEncryptio.Description: Indicates whether the data stored on the user volume is encrypted.

workspaces.workspace.VolumeEncryptionKey.Description: The ARN of the symmetric AWS KMS key used to encrypt data stored on your WorkSpace. Amazon WorkSpaces does not support asymmetric KMS keys.
